# Pantry Index

Last updated: 2026-05-13

Scratch storage for fragments, snippets, quotes, source texts, and gathered
research. Nothing in here gets compiled into the book. Move material into
`chapters/` when ready to use it.

---

## Research notes (generated by Chapter Research Gatherer, 2026-05-13)

| File | Unit | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `01-why-quantum-mechanics_notes.md` | Unit 1 | Classical failures, blackbody (Planck), photoelectric (Einstein 1905), Compton, de Broglie, Franck-Hertz |
| `02-mathematical-foundations_notes.md` | Unit 2 | Complex numbers, vector spaces, Dirac notation, Hermitian operators — the pop-sci book's most absent territory |
| `03-the-schrodinger-equation_notes.md` | Unit 3 | SE as postulated (not derived), Born rule, normalization, probability current, stationary states |
| `04-one-dimensional-problems_notes.md` | Unit 4 | Particle in a box, harmonic oscillator (ladder + analytic), finite well, WKB tunneling with Gamow alpha decay and STM applications |
| `05-quantum-formalism_notes.md` | Unit 5 | Five postulates, rigorous Robertson uncertainty, balloon-analogy correction (Heisenberg 1927 vs. Robertson 1929), measurement problem across interpretations |
| `06-the-hydrogen-atom_notes.md` | Unit 6 | Central potential separation, Bohr as limiting case, quantum numbers, Stern-Gerlach, intrinsic spin (Dirac 1928), Pauli exclusion |
| `07-angular-momentum_notes.md` | Unit 7 | Orbital L operators, spherical harmonics, Pauli matrices, addition of angular momenta, singlet/triplet via ladder construction |
| `08-identical-particles_notes.md` | Unit 8 | Exchange symmetry, bosons/fermions, Slater determinant, spin-statistics (Pauli 1940), periodic table, Bose-Einstein condensation |
| `09-approximation-methods_notes.md` | Unit 9 | Time-independent perturbation, variational (Hylleraas helium), WKB, time-dependent perturbation, Fermi's golden rule |
| `10-quantum-mechanics-in-the-modern-world_notes.md` | Unit 10 | Entanglement/Bell/EPR (Aspect, 2015 loophole-free, Nobel 2022), lasers, semiconductors, quantum computing (NISQ era), superconductivity, tunneling apps |

## Library files (copied from shared MD library, 2026-05-13)

| File | Relevant to | Notes |
|------|------------|-------|
| `_lib_QM-Into-the-Light-Beginners.md` | All units | Another pop-sci QM book — useful for comparison with the TIKTOC audit target |
| `_lib_Penrose-Emperors-New-Mind.md` | Units 5, 10 | Penrose on consciousness + quantum measurement — minority view; useful as a "contested" data point in Unit 5 interpretations |
| `_lib_Davies-Demon-in-the-Machine.md` | Units 5, 8, 10 | Paul Davies on information physics; possible "quantum biology" sidebar material for Unit 10 |
| `_lib_Significant-Figures-Stewart.md` | Units 1, 5, 7 | Ian Stewart on mathematicians — useful for biographical sidebars on Schrödinger, Dirac, Heisenberg, Noether |
| `_lib_Nielsen-Reinventing-Discovery.md` | Unit 10 | Michael Nielsen (canonical quantum-computing textbook coauthor) on networked science; biographical and contextual relevance |
| `_lib_The-Blind-Spot.md` | Unit 5 | Science and observer/experience — relevant for the measurement-problem discussion |

## Source texts (pre-existing — NOT touched by this run)

Large primary-source `.txt` files were present in the pantry before this run.
Research agents used these as background reference; the chapter author can
search them by Griffiths chapter number, equation, or problem.

| File | Use |
|------|-----|
| `822531304-David-J-Griffiths-Introduction-to-Quantum-Mechanics-Prentice-Hall-1994.txt` | **Canonical primary text** — Griffiths is the recommended textbook the companion accompanies. Cite by chapter/section. NB: this is the 1994 1st edition; problem numbers shift in 2nd (2005) and 3rd (2018) editions — verify against the adopted edition. |
| `993201189-Solution-Manual-Introduction-to-Quantum-Mechanics-3e-Griffiths.txt` | Griffiths 3rd-edition solution manual — verify problem statements and answers |
| `436681929-Introductory-Quantum-Mechanics-by-Richard-L-Liboff-pdf.txt` | Liboff — alternate undergraduate text |
| `290663862-A-First-Book-of-Quantum-Field-Theory-Lahiri-Pal.txt` | Graduate-level QFT — mostly out of scope; useful only for spin-statistics theorem (Unit 8) and forward pointers |
| `556121095-QUANTUM-PHYSICS-FOR-BEGINNERS.txt` | Pop-sci source — material that the TIKTOC.md audit critiques |
| `687452060-Quantum-Physics-For-Beginners.txt` | Pop-sci source |
| `698476853-2022-THE-STRANGE-WORLD-OF-QUANTUM-PHYSICS.txt` | Pop-sci source |
| `701622316-Quantum-Physics-for-Beginners-...txt` | Pop-sci source — likely the principal audit target |
